items.title_zh: 分析：随着公司将重点转向人工智能和自动化职位，印度科技行业入门级招聘比例将从 2024 年的 28% 降至 2025 年的约 15%（Tanya Pandey/经济时报）

items.title: Sources: Bond Capital is leading a new investment for AI startup Suno, which would value it at ~$5B, up from $2.45B last fall; Suno is expected to raise $250M+ (Axios)
items.title_original: Sources: Bond Capital is leading a new investment for AI startup Suno, which would value it at ~$5B, up from $2.45B last fall; Suno is expected to raise $250M+ (Axios)
